title: Non-derived private classes and records should be sealed
description: Non-derived "private" classes and records should be "sealed"Analyze your codeintentionality-efficientmaintainabilityCode SmellperformanceWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoClasses and records with eitherprivateorfileaccess modifiers aren’t visible outside of their assemblies or files, so if they’re not extended inside their scope, they should be made explicitly non-extensible with the addition of thesealedkeyword.What is the potential impact?We measured at least 4x improvement in execution time. For more details see theBenchmarkssection from theMore infotab.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Pol
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.triggering_conditions: CompilationUnit nodes containing private or file class/record declarations that are not sealed
never_trigger_on: Classes with base classes or interfaces
logic.reasoning: Detects private or file-scoped classes and records that should be sealed for performance optimization. Uses '^\s*' anchor to match declarations at the start of lines, avoiding matches in comments or strings. Targets CompilationUnit to access full source while using minimal exclude patterns to avoid false exclusions.
